---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

How do you imagine this working? Include API shape, CLI invocation, or UI sketch if applicable.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches have you considered and ruled out?

## Adds to which axis?

- [ ] New sector (which one?)
- [ ] New language (which code?)
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New connector (`~~category`)
- [ ] New agent bundle
- [ ] New cookbook
- [ ] A2A capability (Tier 1 / 2 / 3)
- [ ] Deploy target (Render / Fly / Railway / other)
- [ ] Integration kit (n8n / LangGraph / CrewAI / other)
- [ ] Anti-pattern (which one?)
- [ ] Other (specify)

## Evidence

Is there empirical evidence (study, blog post, GitHub issue, customer feedback) that motivates this? Link it.

## Acceptance criteria

How will we know this is done? List 3-5 concrete check items.
